subject: [PATCH v2 4/5] nfsd: use more reasonable defaults for local VM testing

2026-06-18.patch_summary: This patch updates the default settings for NFS server (nfsd) testing on local VMs to more reasonable values. The number of threads is increased from 8 to 128, and the lease time and grace period are reduced from 90 seconds to 30 seconds. Additionally, version 4.0 of the NFS protocol is enabled by default, and dynamic threading is used with newer kernels. Finally, the mountd service is configured to manage group IDs.
